rulings.Case Title: PATRICE DARK ET AL VS. PAUL THIBEAULT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 1 DEFENDANT PAUL THIBEAULT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to August 8, 2018 per stipulation and order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SH'TARA SEGOVIA VS. MARCIA A. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leaveto File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 2 PLAINTIFF SH'TARA SEGOVIA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leaveto File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Second Amended Complaint to be filed forthwith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VIVIAN SU VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 3 DEFENDANT ARTHUR KEOWN, WENDY KEOWN MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. Hearing Required to address (1) proper measure of economic damages; (2) availability of emotional distress damages; and (3) whether punitive damages are subject to indemnity. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAX M SELVA VS. BENJAMIN CANNON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 4 DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CANNON MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is OFF CALENDAR. Motion to Set Aside was heard on July 24, 2018 per ex-parte order allowing hearing on shortened time. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY JIMENEZ ET AL VS. EUNICE REDONDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 6 DEFENDANT EUNICE REDONDO Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support Thereof is OFF CALENDAR. (1) No valid proof of service on file; delivery to the messenger is not sufficient; (2) Moving party failed to comply with the Ex-parte order granting shortened time. Per the order motion was to be set for July 31, 2018. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN WONG VS. MARK GRIDER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 1, 2018 Line 5 DEFENDANT MARK GRIDER MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Failure to state a cause of action (other than failure to allege service of a requisite notice) is not proper grounds for a motion to quash. See Borsuk v. Appellate Division of Sup. Ct. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. =(501/REQ)
